description: Final signoff contract for the executable migration readiness planner. It aggregates child evidence, report fields, proof commands, known non-goals, residual limitations, and the proof-status row that future closeouts can cite.

final_status.closeout_rule: A planner closeout may cite this artifact only with a fresh RCH pass for the manifest lane and a clean proof-status/manifest contract rerun. Broad workspace health still requires the exact broad lanes listed in the validation commands.

validation_commands.local_only_justification: Python syntax validation is a parse-only script check and does not exercise Cargo or CPU-heavy Rust validation.

validation_commands.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_migration_readiness_planner_signoff_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test migration_readiness_planner_contract migration_readiness_planner_signoff_artifact_is_complete -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_status_snapshot CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_status_snapshot_contract -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_fmt_check cargo fmt --check

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_check_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check --all-targets

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_clippy_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings

known_non_goals: Does not certify broad workspace health without the exact all-target and clippy commands listed above.
Does not prove live external repositories; fixture scenarios are deterministic examples only.
Does not weaken the no-Tokio production graph guarantee or compat-boundary carve-outs.
Does not replace Agent Mail reservations, dirty-tree ownership checks, or direct-main push/mirror policy.
residual_limitations: Planner recommendations are migration planning evidence, not automatic code edits.
Manual design review remains required for ambient authority, region ownership, and dependency holdouts classified as hard blockers.
Cache reuse is not fresh proof for this signoff unless the proof reuse classifier permits the exact claim scope and clean source frontier.
